pr.title: Non-record: JEPA-LM — When Synthetic Success Doesn't Transfer to Real…

output.summary: Uses JEPA EMA target encoder and predictor auxiliary loss in LM training, but representation prediction gains collapse on real text despite synthetic promise.
techniques: JEPA auxiliary loss with EMA target encoder
Predictor head for representation prediction alongside CE
Validation comparison of synthetic Markov vs. real English text
